name: silver_to_gold_gold_misconfiguration_exposure_score

steps.sql_logic:
SELECT 
    "severity_category",
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at") AS "month",
    COALESCE(SUM("exposure_score"), 0) AS "total_exposure_score"
FROM 
    "misconfiguration_scores"
GROUP BY 
    "severity_category", 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at")
ORDER BY 
    "month" DESC, 
    "severity_category";
steps.description: The total misconfiguration exposure score calculated based on severity categories.

description: Transform gold_misconfiguration_exposure_score from silver to gold
